allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\aswin office\\Documents\\work\\Tecktikx\\tecktikx-site\\" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime; "--- now: $\(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss'\) ---")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Contact.jsx right now ==="; Get-Item "c:\\Users\\aswin office\\Documents\\work\\Tecktikx\\tecktikx-site\\Contact.jsx" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Length,LastWriteTime; Write-Output "=== design source ui_kits/tecktikx ==="; Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\aswin office\\Documents\\work\\Tecktikx\\claude-design-system\\project\\ui_kits\\tecktikx\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "=== manifest mentions of Contact ==="; \(Select-String -Path "c:\\Users\\aswin office\\Documents\\work\\Tecktikx\\claude-design-system\\project\\_ds_manifest.json" -Pattern "Contact" -SimpleMatch -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Is path under OneDrive? ==="; $env:OneDrive; Test-Path "c:\\Users\\aswin office\\OneDrive"; Write-Output "=== node process command lines ==="; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "name='node.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId, @{n='CL';e={$_.CommandLine}} | Format-List; Write-Output "=== any process with design/sync/watch/vite in cmdline ==="; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'design|sync|watch|vite|chokidar|nodemon' } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, @{n='CL';e={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(160,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-List)
